html:
Exclusive to:

HeldColdWarmHot

“Scatter these on the floor and heat them up for a hot trap that deals fire damage, and also cooks food.”

-

The Coals are a Trap-like item that can be crafted at an Alchemy Engine using four Flint, two uncooked Heat Glands, and four Nitre, producing four Coals. Each Coal covers one-quarter of a Tile.

When heated, either by a heat source like a Fire or due to Summer, Coals will begin dealing Fire damage to grounded entities standing on them, including the players. Coals also emit lights when heated up. Placed Hot Coals can be picked up, but the player will take 3 Fire damage as if they had extinguished a smoldering item. Placed Coals can be cooled down by Watering Can.

Flammable items placed on hot Coals will start to smolder after 15 seconds. If the food items can be cooked, for every 15 seconds, at most 2 food items per tile will be cooked.

Tips

  • The fire damage can be prevented by wearing Scalemail or applying Thermal Balm.
    • Willow is immune to fire damage by nature.
  • Flying creatures are not affected by deployed Coals, but when they land on the Coals, they will take fire damage as grounded mobs.

Assets

  • Idle 1
  • Idle 2
  • Idle 3
  • Idle 4
  • Idle 5
  • Idle 6
  • Idle 7
  • Idle 8

Exclusive to:
HeldColdWarmHot
“They're burning a hole in my pocket!”
–Wilson
“If only all rocks could be this fun.”
–Willow
“Where to put hot rock trap?”
–Wolfgang
“Only pain awaits those who would follow me...”
–Wendy
“READY TO DEPLOY BURNING ROCKS”
–WX-78
“It never hurts to be prepared, dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“Never know when it might come in handy, eh?”
–Woodie
“I still have a trick or two up my sleeve.”
–Maxwell
“A warriör is always prepared.”
–Wigfrid
“If any bullies chase us, we know what to do!”
–Webber
“I'm cooking up a plan...”
–Warly
“Hot rocks”
–Wormwood
“Anybody feel like a barbecue?”
–Winona
“Oh, this could be a very fun prank!”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee-hee...”
–Wurt
“Sorry Woby, those aren't treats.”
–Walter
“This should slow down anyone following me.”
–Wanda
“They're not very effective when they're cold.”
–Wilson
“Boooo, bring back the heat!”
–Willow
“Is only cold rocks.”
–Wolfgang
“There's no trace of warmth left.”
–Wendy
“TRAP IS IN COOLDOWN”
–WX-78
“The stones have cooled. It's perfectly safe.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's pretty much just a plain ol' pile of rocks now, eh?”
–Woodie
“Useless.”
–Maxwell
“Its flame is spent.”
–Wigfrid
“Now it's just rocks.”
–Webber
“It's cooled off.”
–Warly
“Oh. Not hot anymore”
–Wormwood
“It's cooled right off.”
–Winona
“Stone cold!”
–Wortox
“Glurgh. Trap no good anymore!”
–Wurt
“Now it's just rocks.”
–Walter
“Now they're just harmless cobblestones.”
–Wanda
“It's cooled off, but it could still do some damage.”
–Wilson
“Don't you just wanna curl up and take a nap on it?”
–Willow
“Hot on the feets!”
–Wolfgang
“There is warmth here, but pain as well.”
–Wendy
“THE FLESHLING FOOT FRYER 5000”
–WX-78
“It's still rather hot.”
–Wickerbottom
“A bit too toasty for me, thanks.”
–Woodie
“That should get the crowd warmed up.”
–Maxwell
“My enemies shall regret crössing me... ör crössing that.”
–Wigfrid
“It's too hot for our feet!”
–Webber
“It's been reduced to medium-low.”
–Warly
“Careful! Hot!”
–Wormwood
“And that's why you should always wear thick-soled work boots.”
–Winona
“Rocks so warm, they'll do some harm.”
–Wortox
“Rocks still hot enough to hurt.”
–Wurt
“It looks nice and warm. Er, maybe a little too warm...”
–Walter
“A bit too hot for warming my feet.”
–Wanda
“I wouldn't want to hotfoot across that.”
–Wilson
“Ahhh, that's the stuff.”
–Willow
“Is burny floor. Very bad for walking.”
–Wolfgang
“The heat... it's unbearable...”
–Wendy
“HOT ENOUGH TO BURN THE MEAT FROM FLESHLING BONES”
–WX-78
“Stepping on that would be quite detrimental to one's health.”
–Wickerbottom
“I wouldn't wanna be the unlucky hoser who steps on that.”
–Woodie
“Step right up, who wants to be raked over the coals?”
–Maxwell
“Wöe tö the töes öf all whö pursue me!”
–Wigfrid
“The floor's lava!”
–Webber
“My pursuers will be well roasted.”
–Warly
“Hot ground! Very hot!!”
–Wormwood
“Watch out, hazardous spill!”
–Winona
“A quick cure for cold feet, hyuyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Come here! Good place for stepping! Hee-hee...”
–Wurt
“Watch out Woby, that's hot!”
–Walter
“You wouldn't catch me walking over that.”
–Wanda
“Scatter these on the floor and heat them up for a hot trap that deals fire damage, and also cooks food.”
-
The Coals are a Trap-like item that can be crafted at an Alchemy Engine using four Flint, two uncooked Heat Glands, and four Nitre, producing four Coals. Each Coal covers one-quarter of a Tile.

Placed Coals can be cooled down by Watering Can.
Flammable items placed on hot Coals will start to smolder after 15 seconds. If the food items can be cooked, for every 15 seconds, at most 2 food items per tile will be cooked.

The fire damage can be prevented by wearing Scalemail or applying Thermal Balm.
Willow is immune to fire damage by nature.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Than là một vật phẩm giống như Bẫy có thể được chế tạo tại Máy luyện kim bằng cách sử dụng bốn Đá lửa, hai Tuyến nhiệt chưa nấu chín và bốn Nitre, tạo ra bốn Than. Mỗi Than bao phủ một phần tư Ngói.

{{Scrapbook Info|Scatter these on the floor and heat them up for a hot trap that deals fire damage, and also cooks food.}}

The '''Coals''' are a Trap-like item that can be crafted at an [[Alchemy Engine/DST|Alchemy Engine]] using four [[Flint/DST|Flint]], two uncooked [[Heat Gland|Heat Glands]], and four [[Nitre/DST|Nitre]], producing four Coals. Each Coal covers one-quarter of a Tile.

When heated, either by a heat source like a Fire or due to [[Seasons/Summer|Summer]], Coals will begin dealing Fire damage to grounded entities standing on them, including the players. Coals also emit lights when heated up. Placed Hot Coals can be picked up, but the player will take 3 Fire damage as if they had extinguished a smoldering item. Placed Coals can be cooled down by [[Watering Can]].

Flammable items placed on hot Coals will start to smolder after 15 seconds. If the food items can be cooked, for every 15 seconds, at most 2 food items per tile will be cooked.
{{clear}}

== {{Tips}} Tips ==
* The fire damage can be prevented by wearing [[Scalemail/DST|Scalemail]] or applying [[Thermal Balm]].
** Willow is immune to fire damage by nature.
* Flying creatures are not affected by deployed Coals, but when they land on the Coals, they will take fire damage as grounded mobs.
